text:
今度は変な柱が出てきたわよ！
見るからに怪しいんだけど！

周囲に冷気による攻撃を
放ってくるようです。
無闇に近づいては危険です！

A weird pillar has appeared! That thing is
suspicious no matter how you look at it!

It seems to attack by releasing cold air around
it. Don't approach it recklessly!
